title: Herb and Silky Gluten-Free Toast
description: A simple and flavorful gluten-free toast recipe using silky ingredients and fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: Silky
ingredients.notes: silky ingredients such as avocado or hummus

ingredients.name: Fresh Herb
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs such as parsley or basil

instructions: Toast the gluten-free bread until lightly browned.
Spread 2 tablespoons of silky ingredients on the toasted bread.
Top the silky ingredients with 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh herbs.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
